word: H8276 - שָׂרַג - sârag - saw-rag' - Wrap together

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂרג

Transliteration: śârag

Phonetic: saw-rag'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be intertwined
    1. (Pual) to be intertwined
    2. (Hithpael) to intertwine oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2284

Part(s) of speech: Verb
